name: Rhubarb- Pineapple Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the mixture to boiling, then boil for 3 minutes.
2. Process in a blender until smooth.
3. Add 1 (6-ounce) box of strawberry Jello. Stir well.
4. Pour into half-pint or pint Mason jars while hot.
5. Seal and cool.
6. The jelly may be frozen.
